lines.speaker: Lady Ffion Meilyr
lines.text: Good to see you again [player name]. Have you come to marvel at the beauty of Prifddinas?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's definitely a sight to behold.

lines.speaker: Lady Ffion Meilyr
lines.text: Indeed it is. I love exploring, seeking out the hidden secrets of this world. But nothing will ever compare to this place, to our home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm very privileged to be able to see it.

lines.speaker: Lady Ffion Meilyr
lines.text: And we are very privileged to have you here.
